name: buidl
description: Full dev lifecycle for OP_NET Bitcoin L1 projects: idea → challenge → spec → build → review → ship. Includes the OP_NET Bible (2000+ lines of rules, patterns, and known mistakes) that prevents AI agents from hallucinating package versions, using forbidden patterns, or shipping exploitable code. Now with mandatory on-chain E2E testing, PUA exhaustive problem-solving methodology, and GSD-2 debugging discipline — agents never give up prematurely.
